_comment: Rigel severity tiering for Impeccable findings (PLAN-005 AC-3). Impeccable has NO native per-rule severity tiers, so Rigel classifies here. Antipatterns listed in 'slopRules' are AI-slop / aesthetic tells that must never land — they BLOCK the post-write hook (exit 2). Everything else Impeccable reports is treated as CRAFT and is advisory (printed, exit 0). PROMOTION PATH: to make a craft rule blocking, add its antipattern id to slopRules; to relax a slop rule to advisory, remove it here. Token-VALUE rules (design-system-*) are owned by the eslint-plugin-tailwindcss + token-conformance layers and are turned off in .impeccable/config.json (one job per layer, zero overlap).
